description: Etrian Odyssey is a dungeon crawler RPG first developed by Atlus in 2007 on the Nintendo DS.

v0.1.0.description:
# v0.1.0 [Alpha]

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

For setup instructions, visit [the setup guide](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/Etrian_Odyssey_1_Archipelago/blob/master/docs/setup_en.md).

This version requires the [patcher version v0.1.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.1.0).

## Features

### Goals

- Defeat Fenrir
- Defeat Cernunos
- Defeat Cotrangl
- Defeat Etreant

### Items

- Consumables
- Money
- Key Items (Clear Key, Violet Key)
- Progressive Level Cap (Fixed Increase/Complete Shuffle)
- Progressive Floor Limit (Fixed Increase/Complete Shuffle)
- Class (all 9) (Vanilla/StartWithAll/ShuffleAvailability)
- Skills (ShuffleIndividually/ShuffleGroup)

### Locations

- Treasure Boxes
- Mission Completion
- Monster Codex entries
- Item Compendium entries

### Logic

- Battle Logic Mode "No Logic"
- Battle Logic Mode "Level Only"
- Battle Logic Mode "Simplified"
- Sustain Logic
- Basic Encounter Logic

### Quality Of Life

- Experience Modifier (player configured)
- Shop Unlock Material Cost Divider (player configured
- Material Sell Value Multiplier (player configured)
- Automatic Hold A for battle speed
- Faster Labyrinth walk speed
- Custom UI on the Main Menu to indicate the current level and floor cap
- Resting now cost only 1 level and can be done from level 5, down from 10 and 30 respectively

### Options

- Initial Level Cap
- Extra Progressive Level Cap Items
- Initial Floor Limit
- Extra Progressive Floor Limit Items
- Starting Class Count
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the generic stat increase skills.
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the mastery skills.
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the gathering skills.
- Skills Requirement can be removed (this affects the logic).
- Starting Skill count
- Conditional Drops can be toggled off
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.2.0-rc1.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.2.0-rc1 [Alpha]

The Quest Sanity Update.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.2.0-rc1](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.2.0-rc1).

## New

- New goal: annihilate_the_forest_folk, which is a stratum 4 goal.
- Codex Sanity now support Quest Monsters.
  - Fireeater (Stratum 2+)
  - Toxinfly (Stratum 2+)
  - Omnivore (Stratum 3+)
  - Nightoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Hextoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Steelweb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Golem (Stratum 3+)
  - Alraune (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Pondclaw (Stratum 2+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Manticor (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support every stratum 1-5 enemies!
- Compendium Sanity now support more conditional drops (Only 8 left to implement!):
  - Charcoal (Stratum 1+)
  - Carminite (Stratum 2+)
  - Old Shell (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Gem Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Velvet (Stratum 5+)
  - Holed Limb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Statue Arm (Stratum 3+)
  - Ebon Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Cold Scale (Unavailable in current goals)
- New option: codex_sanity_include_quest_monsters. This is independent to quest sanity, and exclude/include codex entry locations for monster locked behind quests.
- New option: minimize_quest_material_grind. This is independent to quest sanity. Reduce all material requirement quest to only 1 of each required material. Note: This doesn't affect quests that requires shop unlocks.
- New option: Quest Sanity (see section for more info)

## Quest Sanity

- Every Quests from stratum 1 to 5 are implemented.
- Quest 09 - "Explorers Guild trial" duration is reduced from 5 days to half a day (in-game text doesn't reflect this).
- Note: Some quests are not included in their unlocked stratum goal.
- New option: quest_completion_reward_hint. When enabled, the quest description will now tell the player what the AP reward is.
- Automatic scouting: When the Quest Reward hint are enabled, the client will automatically scout those location when the player look at the quest.

## Logic Changes

- B10F Violet Crystal room logically does not require being able to survive the enemies anymore (Changed since the rooms are very small to enable earlier logical access. More similar rooms may receive the same treatment).
- Manticor now properly listed as a Boss in its region instead of a FOE.
- B17F Secret Area North Chest is now a stratum 5+ goal location (excluded from stratum 4 goal).
- Sustain Logic now use the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Usable skills are now determined based on the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Minor change on the "Can Survive Enemy" evaluation.
- The region Survival level check wasn't changed for now, since it caused issue with the secret area of B5F for stratum 1 goals.

## Fixes

- The Clear Key and Violet Key events are now removed - no more weird unexpected text when looking at their vanilla chest.
- Fixed an unintentional space in the textbox for custom items found in treasure boxes.
- The default Battle Logic Mode was changed from level_only to simplified, as it was intended to be (oops).
- Minor consistency issue on calculating usable skills, only affecting the spoiler log.

## Miscs

- Location name for Mission changed from "Mission Clear" to "Mission Completion".
v0.2.0-rc1.title: v0.2.0-rc1
